channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-04-08 20:35 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: ALS is a disease that takes everything. Our goal is to give something back. Kenneth, who has been lo...
item.description: ALS is a disease that takes everything. Our goal is to give something back. Kenneth, who has been losing his ability to move and speak due to ALS, is exploring how Neuralink’s brain-computer interface technology can help translate neural signals into life-changing impact.

item.title: @elonmusk: Kardaschev II or we're not a serious civilization
item.description: Kardaschev II or we're not a serious civilization

item.title: @elonmusk: Marc Andreessen thinks Elon Musk hasn't just built successful companies, he might have actually crac...
item.description: Marc Andreessen thinks Elon Musk hasn't just built successful companies, he might have actually cracked the code on how to manage for the next hundred years. The fundamental problem with any traditional organization that has multiple layers of management is what Andreessen brilliantly describes as "compounding lies." Every layer distorts reality just a little bit more until the original mission is completely lost in the bureaucracy. Musk’s method completely destroys that outdated corporate structure. It relies entirely on an extreme focus on substance and getting straight to the truth. By stripping away the noise, he has figured out the exact blueprint to reconcile being a chaotic fountain of ideas with being a ruthless, systematic builder.

item.title: @elonmusk: The Kardashev Scale is one of the coolest ways to think about how advanced a civilization really is ...
item.description: The Kardashev Scale is one of the coolest ways to think about how advanced a civilization really is Here is the cool visualization fromTerafab.aiThe Kardashev Scale: - Type 1: Harness all the energy on a planet - Type 2: Harness all the energy from a star - Type 3: Harness all the energy in a galaxy The Kardashev Scale is not just sci-fi. It shows us the long-term destiny of intelligent life…if we don’t destroy ourselves first

item.title: @elonmusk: History will be divided into two eras: Before Starship and After We are about to witness a 100x incr...
item.description: History will be divided into two eras: Before Starship and After We are about to witness a 100x increase in civilizational power

item.title: @elonmusk: Google CEO Sundar Pichai on Elon Musk "Elon Musk's ability to will future technologies into existenc...
item.description: Google CEO Sundar Pichai on Elon Musk "Elon Musk's ability to will future technologies into existence is “unparalleled"

item.title: @elonmusk: Google CEO Sundar Pichai on current frontier model's ability to break the security of almost all cur...
item.description: Google CEO Sundar Pichai on current frontier model's ability to break the security of almost all current software. "These models are definitely, like really gonna break pretty much all software out there, maybe already, we don't know."

item.title: @elonmusk: We gradually transitioned from a democratic welfare state to full-on race communism between the 1960...
item.description: We gradually transitioned from a democratic welfare state to full-on race communism between the 1960s and today for two reasons: 1. The beneficiaries of our race laws went from 10 percent of the population to a majority in places like NYC and soon a majority nationally. 2. We bent a lot of rules to give black Americans a one-time boost thinking they’d catch up. That didn’t happen, so now the choice is either go back to colorblindness and the rule of law anyway even though it means unequal outcomes, or let the government keep meddling more and more in the name of racial equity.

item.title: @elonmusk: It will cost more than that, and it will still never happen. There is no chance. It is not possible.
item.description: It will cost more than that, and it will still never happen. There is no chance. It is not possible.

item.title: @elonmusk: first company i've seen with the stated goal of climbing the kardashev scale that actually might do ...
item.description: first company i've seen with the stated goal of climbing the kardashev scale that actually might do it

item.title: @elonmusk: SKY FULL OF STARS:@elonmuskreaffirms his hope for humanity to reach new heights in outer space after...
item.description: SKY FULL OF STARS:@elonmuskreaffirms his hope for humanity to reach new heights in outer space after NASA releases breathtaking new photo of the Milky Way galaxy captured by Artemis II astronauts.

item.title: @elonmusk: Only a few hundred Tesla Model S & X cars left in inventory. Order now if you want one.
item.description: Only a few hundred Tesla Model S & X cars left in inventory. Order now if you want one.

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceXAI Colossus 2 now has 7 models in training: - Imagine V2 - 2 variants of 1T - 2 variants of 1....
item.description: SpaceXAI Colossus 2 now has 7 models in training: - Imagine V2 - 2 variants of 1T - 2 variants of 1.5T - 6T - 10T Some catching up to do.
